title: TAPEBEAR Packing Tape Brown Parcel Tape with Low Noise, Heavy Duty Brown Tape 48mm x 66m, 6Rolls Heavy Duty Brown Tape for Packing Boxes, Secure Sticky Sealing Packaging Tape for Moving House
features: LOW NOISE: Low noise tape, it's quieter than regular tape, does not disturb others, especially for offices, homes and public places. And for use at night or in quiet environments.

BROWN SHIPPING TAPE: Brown packaging tape is commonly used for sealing cardboard boxes and packages for shipping, as it provides a strong, secure seal and is less visible on brown cardboard, does not detract from the look of the package.

65MICRON HEAVY DUTY: Our brown tape refills are made from strong BOPP acrylic adhesive, strong and durable. It is 2.6mil/65micron in thickness, performs well in toughness, will not tear or split easily. The strong tape adheres well and holds boxes together.
EASY TO USE: It's easy to get started with the shipping tape rolls because it fits on any 3" core tape dispenser and gun. Of course, you can also cut it to the appropriate length with scissors.

WIDELY APPLICATION: Each roll measures 55 yards length x 1.88-inch width. Suitable for warehouse, office and home use. The moving tape bulk could be used for shipping, packaging, box and carton sealing. Even you can use it to clean pet hair from sofas and clothes.
description: Product Description Quieter Than Regular Tape Strong Adhesive provides excellent holding power for heavy-duty packaging, shipping and moving. Waterproof No worry about water immersion. Strong Toughness Our thick tape is very good in thickness and toughness, will not tear or split easily.
